days.daily_reflection: Today, I had, I skipped a lot or I skipped breakfast as usual. And for lunch, I went to Grainne Whales, which is a cafe in Kinnegaard in the closest village. And I had a wrap with chicken gougeons, and it came with a side of chips and coleslaw. This is the usual wrap that I get when I go to Grainne Wale. And I'd go here probably around, once every fortnight for for lunch when I'm working from home. And it's purely for convenience. If I'm short on time or if I haven't done groceries, I'll go here and get my lunch. And then for my dinner this evening, I had shakshuka, which, was made with some leftover potatoes from a previous meal. And I also put that with some, an egg and some, tomato sauce, which I have already made and jarred. And, I had that with some herbs, so I had some fresh parsley on top. And, yeah, this is kind of a comfort meal for me, and it's something that I'd have for my dinner quite often because it doesn't require too much cooking. And, yeah, that is everything for today. I also had a Coke Zero with the, meal this evening, and just tap water with my meal, in their cafe earlier on today.

So today, I had I skipped lunch sorry. I skipped breakfast as usual and, I went straight to lunch when, I kinda got up and got myself ready, and I had a Caesar salad for lunch. I ate that at home, and that's kind of a typical lunch that I would have. My partner has actually gone in a stag this weekend, so I was home alone. So I ate that on my own. And for dinner, I then just had eggs on toast, a simple dinner because I wasn't really bothered cooking. And I know that I'm hopefully gonna get a takeaway tomorrow night. So I didn't get, I didn't get one this evening, even though I was on my own, which I would probably usually do. But, yeah, I wasn't in the mood to cook, too much. And, yeah, this is fairly reflective of a normal kind of evening day for me. You know, I kind of have cups of tea in in between, and I may have a coffee and stuff in between. But, otherwise, I think it's, yeah, it's similar to what I'd have on a daily basis.

dinner.why_ordered:
I was craving a spicebag all week and it was in my head that we were ordering one on Sunday when my partner got home from the stag he was on! 
It's the local Chinese's own app. It's most convenient and cheaper than ordering it through another partner.

days.daily_reflection: So today, I had a late ish breakfast, so kind of was a kind of a brunch, vibe. So I had, yogurt with fruit and then some, granola, kind of oats, and chia seeds on top. And, yeah, I woke up late, so had this late at around eleven, and it kinda did me as my lunch as well. I ate that alone, because I was working from home my on my own today. And, then I didn't have any lunch, had a coffee, and a little snack, in the middle of the day, but then had an early dinner. So, I've had I had my dinner. I cooked it at home. I just had vegetables, with some noodles and, kind of our broth as well. So it was vegetarian dinner, and, yeah, cooked that in the oven. I ate it alone as well because I am home alone this evening. I'm just finishing up some work, and kinda had that, as I was chilling, and I also had a Coke Zero with it. So, yes, that and it's a usual usual enough, food day for me. Yeah, it's been a usual enough food week in general, where I kind of have two meals a day, usually with maybe a cup of tea or a cup of coffee and a snack in between. I've been working from home, which is, reflective of a normal week for myself. And, yes, some weeks I might go into the office, on Monday, but it happened in the last seven days. And, yeah, usually eat on my own or with my partner when he's around. You know, a lot of the time he's in Dublin for work, and so he is, not close or not here to to have lunch or breakfast, lunch, or dinner with.
